why_no_actual_output: Runtime logs with the raw or sanitized OpenAI output were not available locally; raw provider bodies should not be logged or copied into artifacts.
previous_failure_vector: Before this fix, the live shortlist Structured Outputs schema required Smart Story Edit recipe fields such as edit_mode, composition_type, timeline_segments, display_title, display_teaser, opening_hook, closing_line, coherence_score, continuity_risk, edit_decision_rationale, and review_flags. Compact live shortlist outputs that omitted those fields failed schema validation. The reduced schema now omits those provider requirements and hydrates defaults server-side.
